title: Health Policy Analyst
description: We're hiring a Health Policy Analyst at Sanofi. This is an exciting opportunity to join our regulated, quality-focused, international team and make a direct impact on our mission. If you have 2-4 years years of experience and are passionate about Pharmaceuticals, we'd love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Monitor regulatory changes and healthcare policy developments affecting the industry
Develop policy positions and advocacy strategies for key legislative issues
Analyze healthcare economics and reimbursement models impacting business
Collaborate with government affairs and legal teams on policy implementation
Research health system trends and competitive policy positioning
Support development of healthcare solutions aligned with policy environment

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Healthcare Management, Public Health, or related field
